positive: A vibrant, highly detailed symmetrical celestial mountain scene. The central subject is a stylized mountain range with sharp, clean silhouettes, partially illuminated by a massive, swirling nebula of deep blues, cosmic purples, and electric teals. Incorporate geometric cosmic elements like faint crystalline lattice structures and glowing celestial pathways intersecting the peaks. A crescent moon and a stylized, minimalist constellation map are visible in the sky. The overall mood is awe-inspiring and ethereal, designed for high contrast and strong visual impact on fabric. Style: Clean vector art merged with bioluminescent fantasy and cosmic engraving, rendered with ultra-high detail and crisp lines. Composition: Perfect central symmetry, clean negative space around the main elements, perfect for repeating pattern scaling. Lighting: Dramatic edge lighting from the nebula, deep shadows contrasting with luminous glowing areas.
negative: blur, bokeh, messy, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, low detail, poor anatomy, jpeg artifacts, excessive color gradients, photorealism, messy composition, messy edges
